calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-04-2006 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar May-25-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Yvonne Lee.
Douglas Holloway, Esq. for Plaintiff: Bank of the West.
Order waiving live testimony at the hearing is in file.
After hearing the evidence presented and declaration of Ernest Knowles, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: Creative Auto Body Shop, Inc., Greg Than and Randy Bautista as follows:
Principal $33,269.97
Prejudgment Interest $756.13
Attorney's Fees $2,500.00
Costs $470.00, for a total of $36,996.10
Plaintiff is entitled to the leased equipments listed in the Judgment, see scanned doc. for details.
Judgment signed in open court.
